steps.title: Define the species directly
steps.content: The student's goal is to explain what Psydrax odorata is. The relevant note identifies it as a flowering shrub and says it was one of the native species catalogued on Oahu.

steps.title: Avoid research-only details
steps.content: B describes Hedychium gardnerianum, not Psydrax odorata. C and D mention the study context but do not directly define the plant's type and origin. The answer is A.
